hooks.command: bash -c 'TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^\s*git\s+commit"; then ./.claude/hooks/pre-commit.sh; fi'

bash -c 'TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^\s*git\s+push"; then ./.claude/hooks/pre-push.sh; fi'

bash -c 'USER_INPUT=$(cat); PLAN_REF=$(echo "$USER_INPUT" | grep -ioE "(plan|create plan|new plan)\s+[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+" | head -1 | sed "s/^[^ ]* //"); if [ -n "$PLAN_REF" ]; then ./.claude/hooks/pre-plan.sh "$PLAN_REF"; fi'

bash -c 'LOG=".claude/hooks/hooks.log"; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [INFO] Session stopping - running final checks" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; ISSUES=0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [WARN] Uncommitted changes remain in working tree" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; echo "WARNING: Uncommitted changes remain. Review with git status."; ISSUES=1; fi; if find .claude/plans -name "ops-*.json" -print -quit 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then for f in $(find .claude/plans -name "ops-*.json" 2>/dev/null); do if ! python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [WARN] Invalid ops.json: $f" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; ISSUES=1; fi; done; fi; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [INFO] Session ended (issues=$ISSUES)" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'

bash -c 'LOG=".claude/hooks/hooks.log"; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [tool-failure] [ERROR] Tool failed: ${CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME:-unknown}" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; echo "[tool-failure] Tool ${CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME:-unknown} encountered an error. Check logs at .claude/hooks/hooks.log"'
